verses.text: No gam ukte aw, a manin thu na khen uh hiam? Note in mi khempeuh' thu a tangin na khen uh hiam
Hi peuhmahlo hi; na lungsim uhah a manlo na ngaihsun uh a, gam sungah ngongtatna na gamta uh hi
Migilote a khan' tawnun khial uh hi. A suah tung mahun lam khial pah uh a, zuauthu gen uh hi
Amaute in gulpi' gu bang gu nei uh a, a khiimte' aw ahi a, a zol siamte' aw ahi zongin bangmah a za hetlo, gul bilngong tawh kibang uh hi
Pasian aw, amau' kam sunga a om a hate uh sutan in la, humpinelkai khanglai hatu-te botkhia in, Topa aw
Tui luangkhiate bangin amaute mangthangsak in la, lopa bangin amaute kituancil gawpin keutumsak in
Amaute a naii-a bei toktol, a hun cingloin a suak, ni a mu ngeilote bangsak in
Na beelte in lingkung kuang sa a sak ma-in, a hing a keu-in amah in phiatkhia mang hen
Heh thukna a muh ciangin thuman mipa lungdam ding a, migilote' sisan sungah amah in a khete sil ding hi
Mite in, “Thuman mi-a' ding noptuamna om taktak a, leitung thu a khen Pasian khat om taktak hi,” ci ding uh hi.
